title: Quake Weapons
description: A Mod containing every weapon and powerup from Quake
body:
Quake Weapons recreates the weapons and powerups as close as possible from id softwares "Quake". All weapons and ammunitions are craftable for the best Minecraft-Quake experience. Powerups spawn randomly around your world.

A full showcase for the mod below

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KGj6Lf_dyqk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**GeckoLib is required**
